name: QA 1701
description:
PCP QA Test No. 1701

Exercise the bpftrace PMDA - histograms



**To reproduce this test, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py ubuntu2204 reproduce

build/ci/ci-run.py ubuntu2204 reproduce
